---
name: create-stories
description: Convert planning/design notes into GitHub issues
agent: agent
---

Read the attached planning/design document and create:

1. One epic issue if needed
2. User story issues with acceptance criteria
3. Sub-issues for implementation tasks
4. Labels, milestones, and project placement

Rules:

- Keep each issue small and testable
- Use the repository issue templates
- Put all new items into the GitHub Project
- Start new items in Backlog unless otherwise specified
